message.entry: MPOWER (^) is not fully supported for integer classes. Both arguments must be scalar. Use POWER (.^) for elementwise power.
Arguments must be 2-D. Use POWER (.^) for elementwise power.
Principal matrix power is not defined for matrix with negative real eigenvalues. A non-principal matrix power is returned.
Incorrect dimensions for raising a matrix to a power. Check that the matrix is square and the power is a scalar. To perform elementwise matrix powers, use '.^'.
MPOWER (^) is not supported for one sparse argument and one single argument.
Maximum number of matrix square roots exceeded. Results may be inaccurate.
Matrix power may not exist for singular matrix.
